behavior_summary: This script implements Xavier, an NPC with (1) an examination/short-description handler (U8P_XAVIER::look), (2) a talk/interaction entrypoint (U8P_XAVIER::use) that assembles dynamic menus and responds to many quest/state flags, (3) a time-of-day scheduler (U8P_XAVIER::schedule) that selects one of several activity behaviors, and (4) area-enter/leave and reactive event handlers (U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea, U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea, U8P_XAVIER::cast, U8P_XAVIER::AvatarStoleSomething) that reset engine references, run U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific monologue branches, teleport/relocate Xavier, or trigger flee/death sequences.

Xavier's conversational behavior (U8P_XAVIER::use) builds option arrays, asks the player for choices, and uses many script/global flags (xavierMet, xavierPissed, various test flags, meeting flags, inventory booleans) to gate available options and responses. Some dialogue choices can invoke external actions (e.g., AIRSPEL::func0BEB) or set U8P_XAVIER::schedule state.

Scheduling (U8P_XAVIER::schedule) queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod(), prepares candidate U8P_XAVIER::schedule values, invokes METHOD::func143A to present/compute selection, and writes the chosen index to global xavierSchedule when process_result() indicates success. U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea reads xavierSchedule to dispatch to one of three behavior branches (U8P_XAVIER::func0BA6, U8P_XAVIER::func0598, U8P_XAVIER::func1429).

Reactive behaviors: U8P_XAVIER::cast handles being targeted by spells—if targeted (Npc::getTarget == 1) it clears refs, barks 'I must flee!', spawns effects, clears immortal, sets dead and teleports Xavier; otherwise it runs a short spawn/suspend loop. U8P_XAVIER::AvatarStoleSomething reacts to theft when in a particular U8P_XAVIER::schedule by resetting refs, barks an accusation, spawns effects, and triggers follow-up helper flow.

Many monologue/helper functions (U8P_XAVIER::func066F, U8P_XAVIER::func0DB7, U8P_XAVIER::func134F, U8P_XAVIER::func1630, etc.) implement U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific speech, idle barks, attention/facing behavior and spawn small effects or door/animation actions. Engine helpers (METHOD::func091C, METHOD::func15E7, FREE::func1C19, Item::getFrame, Npc::pathfind) supply movement, timing, attention and effects.
notable_control_flow: Examine path (U8P_XAVIER::look): guard Npc::isDead(this) -> corpse description; else select short label using xavierName and xavierJob flags (both -> 'Xavier the monk', name only -> 'Xavier', job only -> 'monk', fallback -> 'man').

Scheduling (U8P_XAVIER::schedule): read FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod, prepare local candidates, call METHOD::func143A and suspend; if process_result() true then write xavierSchedule = local4 and call METHOD::func133F.

Area entry (U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea): reset multiple FREE::resetRef slots, read xavierSchedule and call the corresponding behavior helper: 0x01 -> U8P_XAVIER::func0BA6, 0x02 -> U8P_XAVIER::func0598, 0x03 -> U8P_XAVIER::func1429.
Area leave (U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea): clear xavierJustHealed, reset refs, if referenced actor is dead (Npc::isDead) then Npc::teleport Xavier to random coords.

Dialogue (U8P_XAVIER::use): assemble menu arrays (local1/local5), present Ask, capture selection into local2, strcmp branches drive many responses, may set or read many global flags and call AIRSPEL::func0BEB or METHOD::func15E7 for effects/animations.

Reactive spell handling (U8P_XAVIER::cast): query Npc::getTarget -> if targeted run a timed flee/death sequence (reset refs, bark, spawn effects, METHOD timing calls, Item frame changes, Npc::clrImmortal, Npc::setDead, Npc::teleport); else run a short spawn-with-delay loop.
open_questions: Exact semantics and UI of METHOD::func143A / METHOD::func133F used by U8P_XAVIER::schedule(): appears to present/commit U8P_XAVIER::schedule choices but their precise UX/effects are inferred.

Precise meaning and side-effects of many numeric 'frame' values read by Item::getFrame that drive branching in U8P_XAVIER::func0598/U8P_XAVIER::func0BA6/U8P_XAVIER::func1429: which frames map to which behaviors is unclear.
The concrete purpose of xavierJustHealed beyond being cleared on U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea (likely a healing cooldown guard) is inferred but not confirmed.
What AIRSPEL::func0BEB specifically performs when invoked from dialogue (likely a healing/spell action) and whether it consumes resources or triggers other script flags.
Some helper spawn ids and FREE::func1C19 / FREE::func29D8 spawned processes are treated as visual/sound/effect or background tasks; their in-game side-effects and persistence are not fully known.

main_function.name: U8P_XAVIER::look
main_function.purpose: Return the NPC's short description when the player examines Xavier; handle dead corpse text and prefer human-friendly labels based on script name/title flags.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player inspects / 'looks' at Xavier (examination event).
Handles the dead case by calling Npc::isDead(this).
Uses script flags xavierName and xavierJob to choose a descriptive label.

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::use
function_map.role: player dialogue/interaction entrypoint; builds menus and routes many conversation branches

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::schedule
function_map.role: time-of-day scheduler that chooses xavierSchedule and prepares local U8P_XAVIER::schedule data

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger that resets refs and dispatches to U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific behavior

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit cleanup: clears xavierJustHealed, resets refs and teleports Xavier if referenced actor is dead

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::cast
function_map.role: react to being targeted by spells; either short spawn/delay loop or a flee/death routine (clrImmortal, setDead, teleport)

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: react to theft events: reset refs, accuse the player, spawn effects and continue theft-response flow

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func0598
function_map.role: U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific monologue/behavior branch (one U8P_XAVIER::schedule state) with pathfind-based behavior

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func066F
function_map.role: monologue utility producing greeting/help lines and idle barks

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func0BA6
function_map.role: U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific monologue branch (meditation/home behavior) that calls other monologue helpers

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func0DB7
function_map.role: reproach/house-owner monologue branch used when avatar is close/following

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func134F
function_map.role: small monologue helper that may trigger door U8P_XAVIER::use and SFX

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func1429
function_map.role: third U8P_XAVIER::schedule-state utility branch similar to U8P_XAVIER::func0BA6/U8P_XAVIER::func0598 that calls U8P_XAVIER::func1630

function_map.name: U8P_XAVIER::func1630
function_map.role: outdoor/roaming monologue and idle bark routine

internal_calls.purpose: Run the U8P_XAVIER::schedule-0x01 behavior branch upon area entry
Run the U8P_XAVIER::schedule-0x02 behavior branch upon area entry
Run the U8P_XAVIER::schedule-0x03 behavior branch upon area entry
No same-script helpers called directly except final commit call pattern (METHOD::func133F is external); U8P_XAVIER::schedule writes xavierSchedule
Invoke greeting/idle helper when pathfind to target succeeds
Call house-owner reproach monologue for unspecified local2 cases after successful pathfind
Delegate a small door/SFX action when local2 == 5
Call outdoor/roaming monologue helper when pathfind or frame-handling falls through
Continue/finish theft response behavior (further state updates or cleanup)

external_calls.purpose: Detect corpse state to return corpse description
Determine current time-of-day to prepare U8P_XAVIER::schedule choices
Invoke engine method to present or compute U8P_XAVIER::schedule selection (followed by process_result check)
Commit or apply the selected U8P_XAVIER::schedule after writing xavierSchedule
Clear various engine proximity/interest refs when player enters Xavier's area
Relocate Xavier to random coordinates if referenced actor is dead
Detect whether Xavier is being targeted by a spell to determine flee/death sequence
Clear immortal status prior to setting NPC dead during flee/death sequence
Mark Xavier dead as part of the escape/death routine
Spawn a visual/sound/background effect during delays or failure branches
Compute distance to avatar to decide proximity greeting vs idle behavior
Invoke a spell/heal action from dialogue (inferred from name and context)
Spawn pathfinding to a referenced target and wait for process_result()
Pathfind to an item/target; on success call U8P_XAVIER::func066F
Spawn a door-U8P_XAVIER::use action against a referenced object when performing a door-related monologue

reads.name: xavierSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Selects which U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific behavior branch to run on area entry and gates theft response

reads.name: xavierMet
reads.likely_effect: Choose first-visit greeting variants and influence some bark branches

reads.name: xavierPissed
reads.likely_effect: Gate to immediate angry/terminate conversation behavior when true

reads.name: havAvaName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether to include player's name in greetings

reads.name: attemptedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Used to control availability or retry of the wisdom test option in menus

reads.name: passedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Unlocks subsequent tests or menu options when true

reads.name: passedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Used with other passedX flags to unlock further options

reads.name: passedThirdTest
reads.likely_effect: Gates post-third-test dialogue and possible granting of foci

reads.name: hasOwnFoci
reads.likely_effect: Adjusts menu options after tests (whether player already has foci)

reads.name: torwinMet
reads.likely_effect: Add conversation options referencing Torwin when true

reads.name: cyrrusMet
reads.likely_effect: Add conversation options referencing Holy Cyrrus when true

reads.name: stellosMet
reads.likely_effect: Add conversation options referencing Stellos when true

reads.name: stratosMet
reads.likely_effect: Influence availability of Mystic Voice related options

reads.name: hasXavierFoci
reads.likely_effect: Gate 'I have found your Focus' dialogue variation

reads.name: xavierName
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_XAVIER::look() to include the NPC's name in the short description

reads.name: xavierJob
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_XAVIER::look() to include the NPC job/title in the short description

writes.name: xavierSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_XAVIER::schedule() to record the chosen activity U8P_XAVIER::schedule index (drives U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea dispatch)

writes.name: xavierJustHealed
writes.likely_effect: Cleared in U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea; likely used as a cooldown/guard to prevent repeated healing

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements Xavier, an NPC with (1) an examination/short-description handler (U8P_XAVIER::look), (2) a talk/interaction entrypoint (U8P_XAVIER::use) that assembles dynamic menus and responds to many quest/state flags, (3) a time-of-day scheduler (U8P_XAVIER::schedule) that selects one of several activity behaviors, and (4) area-enter/leave and reactive event handlers (U8P_XAVIER::enterFastArea, U8P_XAVIER::leaveFastArea, U8P_XAVIER::cast, U8P_XAVIER::AvatarStoleSomething) that reset engine references, run U8P_XAVIER::schedule-specific monologue branches, teleport/relocate Xavier, or trigger flee/death sequences.
